beginner_rules: BUY SETUP means the scanner found a valid setup, not a guaranteed trade.
WAIT means do not chase; use the better entry or wait for confirmation.
Stop loss is the invalidation area. If price loses it, the setup is wrong.
Target 1 is the first profit zone. Target 2 is stretch target.
Paper-test first. Do not use this as live financial advice.
data_source: Alpaca IEX optional adapter with Yahoo fallback

market_context.risk_note: Broad market is weak. Require stronger confirmation and smaller risk.

phase_warning: Normal research mode. Confirm chart before acting.
scanner_mode: middle-ground: wide scan 150 symbols, deep scan top 40, trade narrow

signals.action_text: Wait. Risk/reward is weak. Needs cleaner entry near $158.66 or higher target confirmation.

advanced_breakdown.summary: Advanced view explains the score drivers; the simple BUY/WAIT decision still controls action.
